data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifies the decision-making process by limiting choices on the interface, ensuring faster decision-making by users.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Ensures interactive elements are accessible and easy to interact with, enhancing user navigation.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Ensures the platform is visually appealing, improving perceived usability.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Designs interface to ensure cognitive load is minimized, enhancing the user experience by not overwhelming with too much information.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Creates a user interface aligned with user expectations based on their experiences from other web platforms.
